name: widget-system-monorepo
description: Framework-agnostic widget layout system — npm monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ncs_software/widget-system && npm run build -w @ncs_software/widget-system-angular && npm run build -w @ncs_software/widget-system-react && npm run build -w demo-angular && npm run build -w demo-react
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @ncs_software/widget-system && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
